Description / Spec: Injection-molded TR-90 or nylon; matte black; full-rim rectangular; thickened hollow temple arms; universal bridge; 140mm W x 45mm H x 150mm D
Sourcing Notes: Shenzhen / Dongguan eyewear OEMs standard; Wenzhou (温州) is CN eyewear frame hub — many TR-90 smart glasses frame suppliers. Frame mold tooling NRE ~¥40k–¥120k ($5.5k–$16.5k) budget separately. At 50 units cost is high; drops to $4–$8 at MOQ 1000+

Description / Spec: Spring-loaded 5-barrel hinge; stainless steel; 1 per side
Sourcing Notes: Wenzhou hinge suppliers standard; also available at HQB (华强北) for prototypes

Description / Spec: M1.4 stainless steel; 2–3 per hinge
Sourcing Notes: Bulk hardware; sourced locally in Shenzhen or Dongguan

Description / Spec: Stainless steel adjustable saddle arms; universal bridge
Sourcing Notes: Standard eyewear hardware; Wenzhou or Shenzhen optical hardware market

Soft silicone overmold over temple end

Description / Spec: MIRA text; laser-etched into temple arm surface

Description / Spec: Thin stainless steel skeleton in temple arms for structural rigidity

Description / Spec: Structural adhesive (3M or local equiv) + silicone IPX2 gaskets for mic and speaker port openings

Description / Spec: Diffractive or geometric waveguide; green monochrome; 28° FoV; integrated with lens substrate; 98% passthrough; AR + AF coated
Sourcing Notes: Chinese waveguide suppliers: 灵犀微光 (Lingxi AR), 北京耐德佳 (Ned Optics), 水晶光电 (Crystal Optech), 视涯科技 (SeeYA). Still highest cost component even with CN sourcing. Custom waveguide design NRE may be ¥200k–¥800k ($28k–$110k) — budget separately

Description / Spec: Same spec as MG-D01
Sourcing Notes: Must be matched pair with MG-D01; order as pair from same supplier

Description / Spec: Micro-OLED or LCoS projector; green monochrome; min 2000 nit; 640x480; 60Hz; compact for edge-of-lens mounting
Sourcing Notes: Chinese suppliers: 晶典微 JBD (Micro-LED), Himax HX7322 (LCoS — Taiwan, MFG in CN), 视涯科技 SeeYA, BOE display engine. JBD and Himax significantly cheaper than Western equivalents at sample qty

Description / Spec: Same spec as MG-D03
Sourcing Notes: Matched pair with MG-D03

Description / Spec: Collimating optic/prism at projector output; couples light into waveguide input port

Description / Spec: Digital MEMS mic; PDM or I2S; always-on low-power mode

Description / Spec: Same spec as MG-A01

Sourcing Notes: Donaldson / W.L. Gore PTFE mesh, or Chinese equiv (深圳市泰科电子). Very common in Shenzhen consumer electronics supply chain

Description / Spec: Noise reduction, VAD, beamforming; may be integrated into SoC

Description / Spec: Open-ear directional micro-speaker; 10–14mm; angled toward ear canal; left temple
Sourcing Notes: AAC Technologies (瑞声科技, Shenzhen) or Goertek — both major global speaker suppliers headquartered in Shenzhen/Qingdao. Excellent quality at low cost

Description / Spec: Same spec as MG-A05
Class D amplifier; may be integrated into SoC or codec
Sourcing Notes: Available LCSC; TI TPA2012, or Chinese equiv (思远半导体 / SiGe Semiconductor)

Description / Spec: Same spec as MG-A03
Accelerometer + gyroscope combined; I2C/SPI; low-power; e.g. Bosch BMI270 or QST QMI8658A

Description / Spec: Photodiode ALS; I2C; adaptive display brightness control
Sourcing Notes: ROHM, Liteon, or CN equiv (Sunlight 晶光电子). Very common, available LCSC

Description / Spec: IR proximity or capacitive; on-head/off-head detection
Sourcing Notes: Vishay VCNL or CN equiv; or use existing IMU + ALS for wear detection logic — confirm at EVT

Description / Spec: BLE 5.2 SoC; audio I/O, display driver, sensors, power mgmt, OTA DFU; option A: Nordic nRF5340; option B: Telink TLSR9518A (lower cost, BLE 5.2, CN domestic)
Sourcing Notes: Nordic nRF5340 ~$8–10 via CN distributors (UTSource, LCSC). Telink TLSR9518A ~$2–4, made in China, strong BLE 5.2 support, widely used in CN TWS earbuds and wearables. Both require Bluetooth SIG QDID. Telink significantly cheaper at volume

Description / Spec: Chip antenna; 2.4GHz; 50Ω; e.g. Yageo / Johanson / TDK

Description / Spec: 32MHz + 32.768kHz RTC

Description / Spec: 4–8MB SPI NOR; e.g. Winbond W25Q64JV or GigaDevice GD25Q64C
Sourcing Notes: GigaDevice (兆易创新) is a major Chinese flash supplier — quality equivalent, lower cost than Winbond. Available LCSC

Description / Spec: 4–6 layer rigid PCB; RoHS compliant; includes PCB fab + SMT assembly at Shenzhen PCBA house
Sourcing Notes: Shenzhen PCBA fabs: JLCPCB, PCBWay, Kinergy, Huaqiu. At 50 units this is highly competitive vs Western pricing. Drops to $8–$15/unit at volume 1000+

Description / Spec: Custom FPC ribbons; temples to display, mic, speaker
Sourcing Notes: Shenzhen FPC specialists: Flexium, Cvilux CN, or local FPC shops. Same building as PCBA fabs in many cases

Description / Spec: Stamped metal RF shield; required for FCC Part 15B / EN 55032
Sourcing Notes: Shenzhen sheet metal shops; also standard catalog shields from Laird / TE available via LCSC

Description / Spec: Full passives kit: resistors, capacitors, inductors, ferrite beads
Sourcing Notes: YAGEO, Walsin, or CN equiv (国巨 / 华新科). Buy from LCSC — next-day delivery in Shenzhen

Description / Spec: Custom-shape thin Li-Po for left temple arm; IEC 62133-2 + UN 38.3 certified; capacity TBD from DVT power profiling
Sourcing Notes: Shenzhen is the global Li-Po capital. Suppliers: ATL (新能源科技), Grepow (格瑞普), EVE Energy (亿纬锂能), Great Power (鹏辉能源). All offer IEC 62133-2 + UN 38.3 certs. Custom cell shapes routine and fast. Much cheaper than Western sourcing

Description / Spec: Same spec as MG-P01; right temple
Overcharge, over-discharge, short-circuit, thermal protection; e.g. TI BQ29700 or CN equiv DDR8312
Sourcing Notes: CN BMS ICs: DALU (达鲁), SH367309 (深圳芯海). Available LCSC at very low cost

Description / Spec: Multi-rail regulator; sleep/wake gating; e.g. TI or CN equiv
Sourcing Notes: CN PMIC suppliers: SY (圣邦微电子 SGMICRO), CW2015 family, or TI via LCSC

Description / Spec: Pogo pin or magnetic contact set on temple arm; mates with included magnetic cable
Sourcing Notes: Shenzhen connector suppliers: Molex CN, or local pogo pin shops in HQB area. Magnetic pogo pin assemblies extremely common in Shenzhen

Description / Spec: CC/CV Li-Po charger; 40-min target charge time
Sourcing Notes: CN charging ICs: TP4056 (common, cheap), or TP4057 / IP2326 for higher current. Available LCSC same-day

Description / Spec: Battery thermal monitoring
Sourcing Notes: Standard NTC; LCSC, same-day Shenzhen

Description / Spec: Clear lens substrate with integrated waveguide; AR + AF coated; 98% passthrough
Sourcing Notes: Danyang (丹阳, Jiangsu) is China's optical lens capital — largest concentration of lens grinders globally. Waveguide integration into lens substrate requires coordination with waveguide supplier. AR/AF coating standard at Danyang fabs

Description / Spec: Custom-ground 1.74 high-index; waveguide integrated; AR + AF coated; ANSI Z80.3 tolerances
Sourcing Notes: Danyang lens grinding: very competitive pricing vs Western labs. $45 est. per lens at sample; drops further at volume. Non-refundable once ordered. Requires valid patient Rx

Description / Spec: Full unit assembly: frame build, PCB integration, waveguide/lens install, display alignment, firmware flash, functional test, QC inspection
Sourcing Notes: Shenzhen assembly labor rate ~¥20–35/hr ($2.75–$4.80/hr). Smart glasses assembly est. 5–8 hrs/unit at sample qty including rework and test. Drops significantly at volume with jigs and fixtures. Find Shenzhen OEM/ODM with smart glasses experience: e.g. Goertek, BYD Electronics, O-Film, or smaller smart glasses ODMs in Shenzhen
